title: God Has A Twofold Part.
content:
God, when for sin He makes His children smart,
    His own He acts not, but another's part;
    But when by stripes He saves them, then 'tis known
    He comes to play the part that is His own.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "God Has A Twofold Part."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
